stories.title: Zuckerberg: Meta’s AI reorganization goals 'haven’t come to fruition’
stories.simple_summary: Mark Zuckerberg said that Meta's plan to reorganize around AI didn't work out the way he wanted it to.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to people who invested in Meta stock — nothing you need to act on.

stories.title: The only AI glossary you’ll need this year
stories.simple_summary: TechCrunch created a guide explaining all the AI words and terms people use.
stories.why_it_matters: This could be helpful if you keep hearing AI words and want to understand what they mean.

stories.title: The browser wars aren’t about search anymore — here are the best alternatives to Chrome and Safari
stories.simple_summary: There are other web browsers besides Chrome and Safari that you can use to look at websites.
stories.why_it_matters: If you're frustrated with your current browser, you have other options to try — but this isn't urgent.

stories.title: Gen Z isn’t happy about AI. Even when mom helped invent it.
stories.simple_summary: Young people are unhappy about how AI is being used, even though some of their parents helped create it.
stories.why_it_matters: This is mainly about what young adults think — doesn't directly affect your business or daily life.

stories.title: Anthropic wants to develop its own drugs
stories.simple_summary: Anthropic, a company that makes AI tools, created a new AI helper designed to help scientists discover and make medicines.
stories.why_it_matters: This is mostly interesting to doctors and researchers — unless you work in medicine or science, this won't affect you yet.

stories.title: AI prey: why watchdogs are telling parents to protect children from nudification apps
stories.simple_summary: There are apps that use AI to remove clothes from people's photos without permission, and child safety experts are warning parents about them.
stories.why_it_matters: If you have grandchildren, it's worth knowing these apps exist so you can talk to them about protecting themselves online.

stories.title: Journalist Karen Hao on Sam Altman, OpenAI & the “Quasi-Religious” Push for Artificial Intelligence
stories.simple_summary: A journalist named Karen Hao talked about Sam Altman, who runs OpenAI, and how he talks about AI in a very enthusiastic, almost religious way.
stories.why_it_matters: This is mostly about how tech leaders talk and what they believe — doesn't directly affect you.

stories.title: A behind-the-scenes look at Midjourney’s medical scanner leaves many questions unanswered
stories.simple_summary: Midjourney showed a video of an AI ultrasound machine it wants to sell to spas and hospitals, but hasn't proven yet that it actually works well.
stories.why_it_matters: This is a tech company's exciting idea, but until they prove it works, it's just a promise — not something to consider yet.

stories.title: Artificial intelligence for food innovation
stories.simple_summary: Scientists are using AI to help create new types of food and food products.
stories.why_it_matters: This could eventually affect what food products are available in stores, but it's still early research.

stories.title: Breakingviews - AI fight exposes Silicon Valley’s mimetic flaw
stories.simple_summary: An article discusses a disagreement in Silicon Valley about how AI companies are copying each other's ideas.
stories.why_it_matters: This is about investor and business competition in tech — nothing you need to pay attention to.

stories.title: Mark Zuckerberg tells staff that AI agents haven’t progressed as quickly as he’d hoped
stories.simple_summary: Mark Zuckerberg told Meta employees that AI agents (computer helpers that do tasks on their own) haven't improved as fast as he expected.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to Meta investors — nothing you need to act on.

stories.title: Artificial intelligence: Yann LeCun works on more flexible AI
stories.simple_summary: A computer scientist named Yann LeCun is working on making AI systems that are more adaptable and flexible.
stories.why_it_matters: This is technical research that engineers care about — doesn't affect your daily life right now.
